title: Nike's stock on track for a 10th straight decline that would be longest losing streak on record

FL, -33.58%, which swung to a loss, missed on sales and lowered its guidance, and said it would suspend its quarterly dividend to conserve cash. The news came a day after Dick's Sporting Goods Inc. DKS, -2.61% also published weak earnings and highlighted a big spike in shoplifting.

title: Nike and Adidas shares trip up after Foot Locker 2Q shocker
text: Shares of sports gear companies Nike Inc (NYSE:NKE) and adidas AG (OTCQX:ADDYY) fell sharply in early Wednesday trading after footwear retailer Foot Locker posted a bigger-than-expected fall in second-quarter sales and reduced its guidance for 2023. The footwear retailer also swung to a $5 million loss, from a $94 million profit a year earlier, and hit pause on dividends, sending its shares 32% lower in pre-market trading.
